sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107000" key="u(pa/tufos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπ-άτῡφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moderately free from</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῦφος,</foreign> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg004.perseus-grc1:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
